title: A Kite in the Park
synopsis: Two friends spend a windy afternoon trying to keep a kite high in the sky.
sentences: Marek and Eli took a bright red kite to the park on a windy day.
At first the kite only dragged along the grass behind them.
Marek ran faster while Eli held the string and shouted directions.
On the third try, the wind caught the kite and lifted it sharply upward.
Both boys cheered as the tail danced in the sky.
For a few minutes, the kite moved smoothly above the trees.
Then the wind changed and pulled the kite sideways.
Eli held the string tight while Marek tried to guide it back.
The kite dipped low, but it did not crash.
Soon it rose again, higher than before.
When the sun began to fall, they brought the kite down slowly.
Their legs were tired, but both of them agreed it had been a good day.
